creator: jontheil@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Alexander Leidinger from comment #1)
# grep openhab /etc/rc.conf
openhab_enable="YES"
#openhab_http_port="8081"
#openhab_https_port="8444"
# openhab_http_port (port):     Set to 8080 by default.
# openhab_https_port (port):    Set to 8443 by default.

#sh /usr/local/etc/rc.d/openhab status |& grep export
(gives no output)

I completely deleted all the directories
/var/db/openhab*
/var/log/openhab/
/usr/local/etc/openhab
